items.example: Getting discovered in a coffee shop was a lucky break for the singer.
She moved to Hollywood hoping to make it big.

items.translation: внезапный успех (букв. успех за одну ночь)
items.example: He was an overnight success after his first single went viral.

items.translation: ни пуха ни пера (удачи перед выступлением)
items.example: Break a leg at your audition tonight!
